reviews.review_title: Banned for 3 days no reason given
reviews.review_description: I was near my son as he just started playing this game, he was banned for a few days and no reason was given as to why. I was present in the room and I can hear him talking. Nothing was done to warrant a ban. An unnamed person has been following him from lobby to lobby and duplicating himself until the game glitches out as well. Not recommended at the moment.
